_comment: EXAMPLE park-detection tuning for ONE specific setup: a Bambu A1 mini with a LEFT-mounted ustreamer camera, ~64x36 detection. These are NOT universal — they depend on where the camera and printer sit and how big/dark the toolhead looks. RE-CALIBRATE when the camera or printer moves (especially left_frac, abs_floor, min_left_density). Copy this file, edit for your setup, and pass it with --config. There are deliberately NO defaults in the code.
_comment_select: The min_outlier/min_left_density/min_confidence/select_candidate_frac knobs are used ONLY by select_smooth.py (the burst fallback). select_candidate_frac is deliberately separate from candidate_frac and tuned differently (0.6 vs 0.75): select scores burst frames after subtracting the per-burst MEDIAN, while mine/live score against a causal EMA background, so the 'sharpest among the strong' cutoff differs. Each script requires only its own knobs, so a select-only or mine-only config can omit the rest.
